response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Discovered a slight phonetic deviation in the song performance where the singers vocalize 'yume' (夢) instead of 'yuuki' (勇気) at 01:05.500. Correctly prioritized the actual spoken/vocalized phonetics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated reference lyrics while correcting the deviation and trimming unused sections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all lyrics directly to vocal start/end boundaries, maintaining silent zones during the extended dance and instrumental break (01:31 to 02:18). Used instantaneous transitions for rapid sequences to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 約束もすることもなく
subtitles.english: Without making promises,

subtitles.original: 交わす言葉も決めたりもせず
subtitles.english: Without even deciding on words to say,

subtitles.original: 抱きしめ、そして確かめた
subtitles.english: We held each other close, and made certain
That those days will never return.

subtitles.original: 記憶の中の手を振るあなたは
subtitles.english: You, waving your hand in my memories...

subtitles.original: わたしの名を呼ぶことができるの？
subtitles.english: Are you able to call out my name?
Turn those overflowing tears...
...into a shining dream.
Life goes on,
Crossing over the night,

subtitles.original: 疑うことのない明日へとつづく
subtitles.english: Continuing on toward an indubitable tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 飛ぶ鳥の向こうの空へ
subtitles.english: To the sky beyond the flying birds,

subtitles.original: いくつの記憶預けただろう
subtitles.english: How many memories have we entrusted?
Fleeting hopes and dreams alike,
Forgotten in an unreachable place.

subtitles.original: めぐり逢うのは偶然と言えるの？
subtitles.english: Can we say our meeting was just a coincidence?

subtitles.original: 別れる時が必ず来るのに
subtitles.english: Even though the time to part will surely come...
Even if it is a fleeting destiny,
As long as you are alive...
Life goes on,
Eternally,

subtitles.original: その力の限りどこまでも
subtitles.english: To wherever, as long as that strength lasts.
Even if I should die,
As long as you are alive...
Life goes on,
Eternally,
As long as that strength lasts,
It will continue forever.
